allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r[0][:19], '|', r[1][:300]\) for r in d['tables'][0]['rows']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('|', r[1][:400]\) for r in d['tables'][0]['rows']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d['tables'][0]['rows']; print\('NONE' if not rows else ''\); [print\(r[0][:19],'|',r[1]\) for r in rows]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d['tables'][0]['rows']; print\('\(none\)' if not rows else ''\); [print\(r[0][:19],'|',r[1]\) for r in rows]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r[0]\) for r in d['tables'][0]['rows']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d['tables'][0]['rows']; print\('\(none\)' if not rows else ''\); [print\('-',r[0]\) for r in rows]")
